  "input": "A bakery uses a quadratic pricing model: 1*size^2 - 5*size + 6 = 0 for break-even cake sizes in inches. The oven time (minutes) per day is recorded: [10, 20, 30, 40, 50].   ],

    {"name":"min_max_format","label":"$var_4","arguments":{"min_val":"$var_3.output_0$","max_val":"$var_1.root_2$"}},
    {"name":"convert_str_to_dict","label":"$var_5","arguments":{"str_list":["range:$var_4.output_0$"],"default_value":0}}
  ],
  "gold_answer": "00-03"
}
